input: user-item interaction graph and knowledge graph (multi-relational entity graph)
output: diversified ranked list of items per user
backbone: Multi-Relational Graph Attention Network (MR-GAT) + Hierarchical Interest Modeling (HIM) + Graph-Content Synergy Module (GCSM) + Adaptive Boosted Fusion (ABF) + Diversity-Aware Re-ranking (DAR)
key_idea: progressively integrate multi-relational graph attention, hierarchical interest modeling, and graph-content synergy via adaptive fusion and diversity-aware re-ranking
